stages.name: data_pipeline
stages.description: Tilize input RM sticks, pass through untilize, write RM output. Identity passthrough validating the full data movement pipeline.

failure_history.suggested_action: Check triage log at /tmp/tt-test-triage-dev0.log for more details. Verify all three kernels (reader/compute/writer) are making progress.

stages.name: subtract_mean
stages.description: Add reduce_sum for mean computation and subtract mean from each element. Validates reduce + broadcast subtract pipeline.

stages.name: normalize
stages.description: Add variance computation (square, reduce, rsqrt) and full normalization. Validates complete layernorm without affine parameters.

stages.name: affine
stages.description: Add gamma (scale) and beta (shift) affine parameters. Full layernorm with all features.
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
gamma_tt = ttnn.from_torch(gamma.unsqueeze(0), dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device)
beta_tt = ttnn.from_torch(beta.unsqueeze(0), dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device)
